artPrompt: Low-angle shot of a hopeful canvasser's outstretched hand releasing a small storm of blank paper flyers that scatter and tumble through warm afternoon light across a town green, one sheet drifting upward and catching golden backlight as if chosen by fate; behind, picket fences and a blurred crowd recede into atmospheric haze, the moment held like a frame of film, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Handful of Flyers
text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom in any order. (You were handing out flyers and found a friend.)
flavorText: Most went in the recycling. One ended up on a fridge. That one became a precinct captain.
